title: Dating and relationships
description: Awkward first dates, texting back too quickly and all those unwritten rules — modern dating is a universal experience! See how your relationship habits stack up!

questions.text: Name something people do before a first date.

answers.text: spend too long picking an outfit
spray too much perfume or cologne

questions.text: Name an awkward moment on a first date.

answers.text: long silence with nothing to say
the bill arrives and no one knows who pays
they look different from their photos

questions.text: Name something people text instead of calling.

answers.text: I'm outside or on my way
I like you or I miss you

questions.text: Name a sign someone likes you.

answers.text: finds excuses to be near you
their friends already know about you

questions.text: What do couples argue about most?

answers.text: whose turn it is to clean
how much time to spend together vs apart

questions.text: Name something people do on Valentine's Day.
Name something people say when they're not ready for a relationship.

answers.text: I need to focus on myself right now
I just got out of something

questions.text: Name something long-term couples stop doing that they did at the start.

answers.text: dressing up nicely for each other
pretending to like everything they like

questions.text: Name something people do immediately after a breakup.

answers.text: delete or unfollow on social media

questions.text: Name a red flag people ignore when they really like someone.

answers.text: they take hours to reply to messages
their ex is still very present in their life
they're rude to waiters or service staff
they never ask about your life
